creator: thomas@gibfest.dk
text:
firefox-4.0_1,1 dumps core every time I press "Show availability" on this page: http://www.damcity.com/cribs/

I've disabled all extensions so that is not the problem. Something in the javascript code must be causing it since it didn't happen when I had noscript enabled (but then the site doesn't work though).

Firefox 3.6 and 4 on Windows 7 64bit doesn't crash when doing the same thing.

I have the coredump available here but I am not sure what to do with it.

Fix: 

Don't know.
How-To-Repeat: press "Show availability" on this page: http://www.damcity.com/cribs/
